summary: Rare early Bruce Hornsby appearance and the final Brent‑less “Gimme Some Lovin’”, though recording source and sound quality are unspecified.
review: This tape captures a historic moment – Bruce Hornsby's debut with the Dead – and includes the last ever performance of “Gimme Some Lovin'” without Brent Mydland, making it a unique set. Reviewers did not comment on the audio fidelity, so the technical quality remains unknown, but the 4‑star rating indicates an overall positive impression of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; praise focuses on historic lineup change and a notable song, with no technical details to assess recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about clarity, mix, or source type; recording quality cannot be determined from the available feedback.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not discussed; emphasis is on the historic personnel change rather than set pacing.

band_member_comments.Keys: First show featuring Bruce Hornsby, noted as a new sound for the band.
